EmailTemplate.name: Approved Credit Note For ADF
EmailTemplate.subject: Confirmation: Credit Note for ADF has been Approved
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Mr / Mrs {!Credit_Note__c.Customer_Name__c},
We are pleased to inform you that a credit amount of Rs. {!TEXT(Credit_Note__c.Interest_To_Be_Settled__c)} has been completed towards your purchased Runwal unit {!Credit_Note__c.Unit_No__c}, {!Credit_Note__c.Project__c} in lieu of the advance payment made by you towards your unit.
We thank you for being a part of the Runwal Family .
Best regards, Runwal Group
